icms.note: State-level VAT; interstate rate 12% (most goods); intrastate varies by state (17-25%)

pis.note: Federal social contribution on gross revenue; Lucro Real: 1.65% non-cumulative

cofins.note: Federal social contribution on gross revenue; Lucro Real: 7.6% non-cumulative

ipi.note: Federal excise on industrial goods; rate varies by product NCM code

indirect_taxes.summary_note: Representative interstate ICMS rate used as headline VAT-equivalent

social_security.note: INSS employer 20% on payroll; FGTS 8% (severance fund); employee INSS up to 14%

regime.lucro_real: Actual profit regime — mandatory for revenue >BRL 78M or financial institutions; IRPJ/CSLL on actual taxable income; non-cumulative PIS/COFINS
regime.lucro_presumido: Presumed profit regime — available up to BRL 78M; IRPJ/CSLL on fixed margin; cumulative PIS/COFINS
regime.simples_nacional: Simplified unified tax regime for micro/small enterprises (ME/EPP); replaces multiple taxes with single DAS payment
